Name: Alonzo King LINES Ballet
Tagline: Alonzo King LINES Ballet | A world-renowned trailblazer, contemporary dance company, education and artistic hub in San Francisco.
About: was created with the purpose of touching hearts and stirring minds through dance. As an organization, Alonzo King LINES Ballet Alonzo King LINES Ballet embraces a spirit of inquiry and openness to change combined with a reverence for legacy and history.
Philosophy: Alonzo King LINES Ballet embraces a spirit of inquiry and openness to change combined with a reverence for legacy and history. The mission and purpose of Alonzo King LINES Ballet is to nurture artistry and the development of creative expression in dance, through collaboration, performance, and education.
Outcomes: Graduates of Alonzo King LINES Ballet often join prestigious dance companies worldwide, and many have been recognized with awards for their artistic excellence. The program fosters strong technical skills and creative expression, leading to successful careers in dance.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply to Alonzo King LINES Ballet through an audition process, which typically includes a live or video audition. Applications are accepted on a rolling basis, but early submission is encouraged due to limited spots.
Quote: Cultivating the gifts of developing dancers. One step at a time.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: LINES provides regular professional development for classroom and studio educators of all levels and experiences.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: LINES Community Programs provide students with access to the creative process of Alonzo King LINES Ballet. Rooted in our unique HeART with LINES curriculum emphasizing humility, empathy, artistry, ritual, and truth, LINES Community Programming benefits a child’s physical wellness and imagination through the power of discovery and collaboration.
Performance.Academic Integration: Designed for youth in Grades 5 through Middle School, our camp explores dance using our HeART with LINES curriculum, rooted in humility, empathy, artistry, ritual, and truth. No experience necessary, only a willingness to try!
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Alonzo King LINES Ballet often secure positions in renowned companies like the San Francisco Ballet and Royal Ballet. Many alumni have also received accolades such as the Princess Grace Award for their exceptional artistry.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The state-of-the-art facilities at Alonzo King LINES Ballet include spacious studios with sprung floors and a dedicated performance theater. Students have access to a comprehensive library of dance literature and multimedia resources.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at Alonzo King LINES Ballet is meticulously tracked through biannual evaluations and personalized feedback sessions. Regular parent-teacher meetings ensure transparent communication and collaborative support for student development.
